targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "PENDING" FROM "Tweet" WHERE status = 'PENDING'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "GENERATING" FROM "Tweet" WHERE status = 'GENERATING'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "APPROVED" FROM "Tweet" WHERE status = 'APPROVED'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "POSTED_CONFIRMED" FROM "Tweet" WHERE status = 'POSTED_CONFIRMED'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "RESOLVE_FAILED" FROM "Tweet" WHERE status = 'RESOLVE_FAILED'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "ERROR" FROM "Tweet" WHERE status = 'ERROR'

panels.title: Tweet Lifecycle Table
panels.description: All tweets with full lifecycle info. has_feedback and topic_edited columns show at a glance which tweets received user input.

targets.rawSql: SELECT t.id, t.original_topic, t.edited_topic, CASE WHEN t.edited_topic IS NOT NULL AND t.edited_topic != t.original_topic THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS topic_edited, t.status, t.time_of_day, t.score, t.posted, t.posted_at, t.live_url, t.fingerprint, t.created_at, CASE WHEN f.cnt > 0 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS has_feedback FROM "Tweet" t LEFT JOIN (SELECT tweet_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "Feedback" GROUP BY tweet_id) f ON t.id = f.tweet_id ORDER BY t.created_at DESC

panels.title: Unposted Tweets (slipped through)
panels.description: Tweets where posted=false but status is not PENDING or GENERATING — needs investigation.

targets.rawSql: SELECT id, original_topic, edited_topic, status, fingerprint, created_at FROM "Tweet" WHERE posted = false AND status NOT IN ('PENDING','GENERATING') ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT computed_at AS time, outcome_score AS "Outcome Score" FROM "TweetOutcome" WHERE $__timeFilter(computed_at) ORDER BY computed_at
SELECT tier, COUNT(*) AS count FROM "TweetOutcome" GROUP BY tier

SELECT o.tweet_id, o.topic, o.peak_likes, o.peak_retweets, ROUND(o.outcome_score::numeric, 2) AS outcome_score, o.tier, o.time_of_day, o.day_of_week, o.computed_at FROM "TweetOutcome" o ORDER BY o.outcome_score DESC

panels.title: Engagement Growth Curves (likes)
panels.description: Each tweet's like count across all 5 engagement snapshots (10m → 48h).

targets.rawSql: SELECT e.fetched_at AS time, e.likes AS "Likes", e.tweet_id FROM "Engagement" e WHERE $__timeFilter(e.fetched_at) ORDER BY e.fetched_at
SELECT e.fetched_at AS time, e.retweets AS "Retweets", e.tweet_id FROM "Engagement" e WHERE $__timeFilter(e.fetched_at) ORDER BY e.fetched_at

panels.title: Best Posting Slot (time × day)
panels.description: Avg outcome score per time-of-day × day-of-week combination. Higher = better slot.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time_of_day, day_of_week, COUNT(*) AS tweets, ROUND(AVG(outcome_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_outcome, ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN tier='high' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0)) * 100, 1) AS high_tier_pct FROM "TweetOutcome" WHERE time_of_day IS NOT NULL AND day_of_week IS NOT NULL GROUP BY time_of_day, day_of_week ORDER BY avg_outcome DESC

SELECT LOWER(TRIM(topic)) AS topic, COUNT(*) AS tweets, ROUND(AVG(outcome_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_outcome, SUM(CASE WHEN tier='high' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_tier_count FROM "TweetOutcome" WHERE topic IS NOT NULL GROUP BY LOWER(TRIM(topic)) ORDER BY avg_outcome DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Tweet Versions (all drafts)
panels.description: Every generated draft with quality score and critique. Multiple versions per tweet_id = autoRefiner fired.

targets.rawSql: SELECT tweet_id, version, quality_score, LEFT(content, 140) AS content_preview, LEFT(critique, 120) AS critique_preview, created_at FROM "TweetVersion" ORDER BY created_at DESC
